description_long: This treadmill features a robust, modern design with a turquoise running deck and a dark gray console and support structure. The running surface is wide and appears well-cushioned, with side rails for safety. The console is equipped with a visible control panel, including a prominent red emergency stop button and several other controls, and is supported by sturdy vertical bars. The handrails extend outward and slightly upward, providing ample support for users, and appear to have ergonomic grips. The treadmill sits on a set of wheels at the rear, suggesting it can be moved when needed. The overall build is solid, with a sleek, glossy finish and a professional appearance suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern treadmill with a turquoise running deck, dark gray console, and ergonomic handrails, featuring a prominent control panel and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the turquoise running deck, angled console, and rear wheels for mobility.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide running belt, extended handrails, and central control panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the support structure and rear wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the running deck, handrails extending outward, and the back of the console.
attribute_control_panel: The control panel is located at the top of the console, facing the user, and features a prominent red emergency stop button, several smaller buttons, and a central display screen. The layout suggests easy access to speed and incline controls.
attribute_running_belt: The running belt is wide and long, occupying most of the treadmill's base, with a smooth texture and no visible markings. It is bordered by side rails for safety and appears well-cushioned.
attribute_handrails: The handrails are continuous, extending outward and slightly upward from the console, with ergonomic grips at the ends. They are positioned at a comfortable height for user support.
attribute_display_screen: The display screen is centrally located on the console, rectangular in shape, and appears to be digital, with a clear interface for displaying workout information.
attribute_power_cord: The power cord is not clearly visible in the provided images, and its attachment point or length cannot be determined from these views.
